title: The Caviar Market 2021 Edition (EUMOFA) — Sturgeon Aquaculture Production incl. Iran, 2010-2018
source_org: EUMOFA (European Market Observatory for Fisheries and Aquaculture Products), European Commission DG MARE
time_coverage: 2010-2018 (report also has global/EU narrative data back to 1977 and 2002)
units: tonnes (whole fish, live weight, aquaculture production) -- NOT caviar/roe weight
license_terms: European Commission open-access publication (reuse permitted with source acknowledgement per EU standard reuse policy)
notes: data.csv extracted from Table 3 ('Sturgeon production (tonnes)'), page 12 of the PDF (page 15 in absolute PDF page order due to cover/TOC pages), sourced by EUMOFA to FAO. VISUAL VERIFICATION: table was rendered via `pdftoppm -r 200` and read directly with the Read tool (image at scratchpad/eumofa_p15-15.png during this session) to confirm every digit against the raw pdftotext -layout extraction, which used European '.' thousands-separator formatting (e.g. '2.839' = 2,839 tonnes) that could otherwise be misread. Values cross-checked column-by-column against the 'Total' row (sum of all countries) which matched. This complements (does not duplicate) data/raw/faostat/tcl-trade-crops-livestock/, which does NOT cover fisheries/caviar at all (confirmed zero caviar/sturgeon/fish-roe matches for Iran in that file). Note this table measures whole-fish aquaculture output, not extracted caviar (roe) weight -- roe is typically ~10-15% of a mature female sturgeon's weight, so these figures are NOT directly comparable to the caviar-specific tonnages in the sibling dataset iran-caviar-exports/ifo-caviar-production-export-compiled/.
